nasb.text: Saul sent to Jesse, saying, “Let David now stand before me, for he has found favor in my sight.”

esv.text: And Saul sent to Jesse, saying, “Let David remain in my service, for he has found favor in my sight.”

cnv.text: 掃羅再派人到耶西那裡去，說：“請你讓大衛侍立在我面前吧，因為我喜歡他。”

ccb.text: 扫罗派人去见耶西，说：“你就让大卫留在我的身边吧，因为我喜欢他。”
